standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per retained ICU stay agent-specific support episode interval

database_mapping.source_grain: one reviewed upstream vasoactive agent course before same-agent interval union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive agent-specific support episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient identifier from trusted stay map and parent support asset
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital admission identifier from trusted stay map and parent support asset
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU stay identifier from upstream infusion, parent support, and trusted stay map

included_scope: mixed_pressor_inotrope role class retained by opening v1
agent labels dopamine, epinephrine, norepinephrine, phenylephrine, and vasopressin
adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents child agent-specific support episodes, not parent any-support truth, raw infusion events, dose normalization, or phenotype truth.

episode_interval_build_translation.episode_label_translation: retain standardized vasoactive agent labels dopamine, epinephrine, norepinephrine, phenylephrine, and vasopressin
episode_interval_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged agent_support_starttime after approved same-agent course union
episode_interval_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged agent_support_endtime after approved same-agent course union
episode_interval_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous intervals only when stay_id and std_vasoactive_agent match; any positive gap or agent-label change starts a new child episode
episode_interval_build_translation.parent_link_translation: require exactly one same-stay std_vasopressor_support_active parent episode containing the child interval
episode_interval_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive agent-specific episode under this source rule, not proof of no broader vasopressor support

validation_contract.no_row_policy_check: absence of row is not universal proof of no vasopressor support; use parent std_vasopressor_support_active for any-support timing
notes: This is a child detail layer under std_vasopressor_support_active.
Strict concurrency means positive overlap with a distinct retained agent episode, not merely multi-agent membership inside a parent episode.
Opening v1 retains mixed_pressor_inotrope dopamine rows by design.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_vasopressor_support_agent_episode outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path.
